title: OfflineGrowth
description: OfflineGrowth lets crops in Minecraft continue growing while you’re offline, so your farms thrive even when you’re away.
body:
**Main Features**

🌱 Offline Crop Growth – Crops, nether wart, and sweet berry bushes progress even while you’re offline.

⏱ Customizable Growth Rate – Adjust how fast crops grow while away with easy config options.

🔧 Plug-and-Play – No commands or setup needed; works automatically once installed.

_Note: This mod is still in development. You may occur problems. If you need, dm my discord to report issues: @g1obalworlds._

                                          **THANK YOU!**
